title: Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita, 2023
objective: Procedure workflow deck for FIR intake, investigation control, bail, and trial progression.

sections.note: Primary checkpoint for FIR registration duties and refusal-risk analysis at intake.
Supports investigation planning and statement integrity review before filing.

sections.topic: Supply of police report and documents
sections.note: Tracks disclosure obligations to accused and helps avoid procedural challenge.
Used to structure bail arguments around gravity, flight risk, and cooperation.
Reference route for post-judgment strategy and timeline-sensitive filings.
Important when deciding between sentence modification, remand, or acquittal arguments.
